# random.airat.top

Summary:
random.airat.top is a static, privacy-first text randomizer based on AiratTop ad-generator syntax. It supports synonyms, permutations, separator shuffle, escaped special symbols, unlimited nesting, `%rand%`, unique output without duplicates, and Text/JSON output modes.

Primary URL:
https://random.airat.top

Key features:
- Synonyms with `{a|b|c}` and optional fragments with `{|text}`.
- Permutations with `[a|b|c]` and custom separators with `[+,+a|b|c]`.
- Nested template syntax and top-level `|` paragraph shuffle.
- Escaping for reserved characters: `\{`, `\}`, `\|`, `\[`, `\]`, `\+`, `\\`.
- `%rand%` replacement with random digit `0..9`.
- Unique output mode by default (duplicate lines are not emitted).
- Output format switch between text lines and JSON array.
- Download output as `.txt` or `.json` depending on selected format.
- Local settings persistence for template, output count, output format, and theme.

Tech stack:
HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.

Privacy:
No text history stored on server; generation happens locally in browser. Only local settings are stored.

Contact:
AiratTop - mail@airat.top
